Export
How to export
Getting your PNGs
1
Click "Download All PNGs"All images are embedded as data URIs — no server needed. Opens a ZIP with all slides at exact dimensions.
2
Open individual slidesClick "Open ↗" on any card, then Chrome DevTools → device toolbar → set exact px → right-click → Capture screenshot.
3
If download failsRun python3 -m http.server 8080 from agentchat-hub/, then open localhost:8080/mockups/preview.html.
